body.title: pe_chain cloud default: deepseek-r1 → qwen-2.5-coder-32b-instruct (qwen-family consolidation)
body.result: default swap deepseek-r1 → qwen/qwen-2.5-coder-32b-instruct; docstrings + <think>-strip comment updated. 2 gated follow-ups filed (T-pe-chain-via-uc-proxy for UC routing, T-cloud-fallback-alert for budget-surprise prevention). 2abbf3e3.
body.description:
pe_chain._CLOUD_PROGRAMMING_MODEL defaulted to deepseek/deepseek-r1 (reasoning model, ~25-50x more expensive per call than qwen-coder due to reasoning-token output volume). Local path uses qwen2.5:7b via Ollama exclusively — cloud should stay in the same family. Observed 2026-04-22 18:00:38: pe_chain called deepseek via the silent ollama-unhealthy fallback.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py (default value + docstring anchors 'OR DeepSeek' → 'OR cloud Qwen').
**Design rules:** docs-in-code (docstring + comments must match the code's actual target).
**Scope boundary:** IN — default model value, docstring/comment anchors, <think>...</think> strip comment made model-agnostic. OUT — routing through UC inference proxy (separate ticket T-pe-chain-via-uc-proxy). OUT — making the ollama→cloud fallback noisier (separate ticket T-cloud-fallback-alert).
**Test plan:** no new tests — pure default-value + docstring change. Existing test_pe_chain_qwen_tier enforces qwen-family for local; cloud path isn't covered by an integration test today (would require live OR call).
